2606.31699.title: Look But Don't Touch with Sparse Autoencoders for Unlearning in Diffusion Models
2606.31699.paper_summary: Sparse autoencoders (SAEs) have recently been proposed as interpretable tools for concept-level manipulation, under the assumption that isolated features can serve as controllable intervention points. In this work, we systematically evaluate this assumption in the context of object erasure and steering in diffusion models. We show that while SAEs reliably detect and localize semantic concepts within diffusion model activations, direct intervention in their latent space frequently induces out-of-distribution activations, resulting in severe visual artifacts. To disentangle detection from intervention, we use SAE activations purely as semantic detectors to identify image regions containing the target object, and replace those patch embeddings with the ones that do not contain it. This detection-based replacement preserves the diffusion model's activation statistics and produces significantly cleaner erasure results than latent steering. Our findings reveal a fundamental gap between concept detection and concept intervention in diffusion models: monosemantic or sparse features are not inherently suitable as control knobs for steering. These results position SAEs as powerful interpretability tools for analyzing generative models, but highlight important limitations when used for direct manipulation, such as unlearning.
2606.31699.paper_summary_zh: 稀疏自編碼器（SAEs）最近被提出作為概念層級操作的可解釋工具，假設孤立的特徵可以作為可控的干預點。<lb/>在這項工作中，我們系統地評估了這一假設在擴散模型中的物體抹除和引導的背景下。<lb/>我們顯示，雖然SAEs可靠地檢測和定位擴散模型激活中的語義概念，但在其潛在空間中的直接干預經常會引發超出分佈的激活，導致嚴重的視覺伪影。<lb/>為了將檢測與干預分開，我們僅使用SAE激活作為語義檢測器，以識別包含目標物體的圖像區域，並用不包含該物體的補丁嵌入來替換這些區域。<lb/>這種基於檢測的替換保留了擴散模型的激活統計，並產生了比潛在引導顯著更乾淨的抹除結果。<lb/>我們的研究結果揭示了擴散模型中概念檢測與概念干預之間的根本差距：單語義或稀疏特徵並不固有地適合作為引導的控制旋鈕。<lb/>這些結果使SAEs成為分析生成模型的強大可解釋性工具，但在用於直接操作（如遺忘）時也突顯了重要的局限性。
2606.31699.author: Enrico Cassano et.al.
2606.31699.authors: Enrico Cassano, Riccardo Renzulli, Rayyan Ahmed, Marco Grangetto, Stephan Alaniz
